title: henningia persica
intro: Henningia persica, also known as Persian heather or Persian heath, is a flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Henningia persica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve gut health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Henningia persica is often used as a dried herb or in the form of tea, and its extracts may also be used in supplements or capsules.
